name: Maverick MCP
what_it_does: Personal stock analysis MCP server built on FastMCP 2.0 providing 39+ financial tools including technical indicators (SMA, EMA, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands), VectorBT-powered backtesting with 15+ strategies and ML algorithms, stock screening, portfolio optimization, and AI-powered research agents. Pre-seeded with 520 S&P 500 stocks.
use_cases: Personal stock screening and analysis via Claude Desktop
Backtesting trading strategies with historical data
AI-powered financial research with multiple LLM backends
not_for: Production trading systems or automated order execution
best_when: You want comprehensive personal stock analysis tools directly accessible from Claude Desktop or other MCP clients, with backtesting capabilities and no commercial platform subscription fees.
avoid_when: You need production-grade trading infrastructure, real-time data feeds, or regulatory-compliant financial tools. Also avoid if you don't want to manage API keys for data providers.

auth.notes: Requires TIINGO_API_KEY (mandatory, free tier available). Optional: OPENROUTER_API_KEY (recommended for AI research), EXA_API_KEY (web search), plus fallback keys for OpenAI, Anthropic, FRED, Tavily.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Server itself is free. Tiingo free tier provides basic stock data. AI research features require paid API keys (OpenRouter recommended for cost savings).
pricing.notes: MIT licensed. Costs come from third-party API usage (Tiingo, OpenRouter, etc.), not the tool itself.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: No explicit error handling documentation, but FastMCP 2.0 framework provides baseline error responses.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only analysis operations are inherently idempotent. Screening and backtesting produce deterministic results for same inputs.
known_agent_gotchas: Requires TA-Lib system library installation (not just pip) which can be tricky on some platforms
SSE endpoint URL requires trailing slash (http://localhost:8003/sse/)
Multiple API keys needed for full functionality -- partial setup gives partial features
Pre-seeded database only covers S&P 500 stocks
